name: Riviera Acacia Wood Patio Bar Cart With Tray: Mobile Storage, Weather-Resistant - Christopher Knight Home
description: The Christopher Knight Home Riviera Bar Cart offers a perfect solution for entertaining any amount of guests. Use this cart as extra storage or table space that is not only easily accessible but also comes equipped with wheels so completely mobile. The extra storage space on the bottom is complimented by a flat top and a removable tray on top. Whether you are enjoying your time with family or friends this bar cart will remain a trendy piece for years to come.
